creator: clefevre@citeweb.net
text:
David W. Chapman Jr. wrote:
> This is what I get, maybe because I'm running -current

oops! no. those files exists in the libvorbis distro but aren't installed.
well, It seems I go too fast to submit this PR. I suppose I've compiled it
w/ CPPFLAGS=-I${PORTSDIR}/audio/libvorbis/work/libvorbis-1.0rc1/lib in
the environment (or something like this) and forgot about that.
do you have an idea on how to handle this case where a port depends on
files which aren't installed by another port and to stay in sync w/ it ?

Cyrille.
--
